debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
X : Set α
hX : Maximal (fun X => @Graph.MatchingNumber α β (G - X) = @Graph.MatchingNumber α β G - X.encard) X
⊢ 2 * @Graph.MatchingNumber α β (G - X) = (G.vertexSet \ X).encard - encard (@Graph.OddComponents α β (G - X))

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
have h_iness : ∀ x, (G - X).inessential x := by
    intro x
    obtain hx | hx := em (x ∈ V(G - X))
    · have h_ss : X ⊂ insert x X := ssubset_insert hx.2
      have h_prop := hX.not_prop_of_ssubset h_ss
      have h_eq : ν(G - X - x) = ν(G - X) := by
        apply le_antisymm
        · apply MatchingNumber_mono; intro e; simp; intro h; simp [h]
        · have h_not := hX.not_prop_of_ssubset h_ss
          rw [encard_insert_of_not_mem hx.2, ← vertexDelete_vertexDelete] at h_not
          exact (MatchingNumber_vertexDelete_ge (G - X) x).lt_of_ne h_not.symm
      obtain ⟨M, hM_max⟩ := exists_isMaxMatching (G - X - x)
      exact ⟨M, hM_max.isMaxMatching_of_MatchingNumber_eq h_eq, hM_max.isMatching.subset.trans (vertexSet_subset_vertexDelete _ _) |>.not_mem hx⟩
    · exact inessential_of_not_mem hx
  obtain ⟨M, hM, h_comp⟩ := foo_of_forall_inessential h_iness
  have hM_max : (G - X).IsMaxMatching M := isMaxMatching_of_special_matching hM h_comp
  have h_odd : (G - X).OddComponents = {K | K.IsCompOf (G - X)} :=
    oddComponents_eq_of_special_matching hM h_comp
  rw [← hM_max.encard, h_odd, encard_vertexSet_matching hM, encard_vertexSet_diff_unmatched hM h_comp]
